name: /audit-pack: emits the 'all-three-fresh' badge for the commit only when standards + pr-corpus + compliance are all fresh-within-fetch-frequency
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"standards":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","pr_corpus":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","compliance":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"}' > compliance/freshness.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --freshness-file "$PWD/compliance/freshness.json" --commit-sha abc123 --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section freshness-badge && grep "all-three-fresh" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "abc123" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
